name: Ruckus Wireless, Inc.
description: Ruckus Wireless, Inc. was a global supplier of advanced wireless systems for the rapidly expanding mobile Internet infrastructure market. Headquartered in Sunnyvale, California, the company specialized in providing high-performance indoor and outdoor "Smart Wi-Fi" products and services for mobile operators, broadband service providers, and corporate enterprises. Their technology was designed to deliver reliable, high-capacity wireless connectivity in challenging environments. Ruckus Wireless was publicly traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol RKUS before being acquired and integrated into the broader networking portfolio now known as RUCKUS Networks, a brand currently owned by CommScope.
